creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
While rebuilding the source tree with revision 2a0c0aea420... on 14.0-CURRENT main-n257861-4385a9f851b in the VirtualBox VM this failure occurred:

> pid 79018 (clang), jid 0, uid 0, was killed: a thread waiting too long to allocate a page

The base system is quite old, but I still decided to report this.
